description.en: Consolidates the list of separateSVGTransformobjects by multiplying the equivalent transformation matrices together to result in a list consisting of a singleSVGTransformobject of typeSVG_TRANSFORM_MATRIX. The consolidation operation creates newSVGTransformobject as the first and only item in the list. The returned item is the item itself and not a copy. Any changes made to the item are immediately reflected in the list.
